meaning: n.古时 Palestine地方的都市,偏僻的地方
examples: There weren't even any walls in Jericho at the time of Joshua.
We want to spy in Jericho.
Not far from Jericho, the River Jordan squiggles through the desert dividing the West Bank from Jordan.
C. filings, Jericho State Capital was paid a ninety-thousand-dollar fee, plus stock warrants, for making the introduction.
